name: squid-js-monorepo
description: Browser-usable FHE via cedoor/squid: wasm bindings, Node bindings, and a client/server demo.

scripts.build: pnpm run build:squid && pnpm run build:server && pnpm run build:client
scripts.clean: rimraf target packages/squid-js/wasm packages/squid-js/napi packages/squid-js/dist apps/server/dist apps/client/dist
